name: audit-log
description: Audit logging: records who did each mutating request (who/method/path/status) to an audit_logs table — a NestJS interceptor for your own API routes plus a better-auth hook for auth/admin actions (login, ban, role changes, ...). Requires auth.
env: # audit-log: on/off is managed on the admin Settings page (stored in the DB,
# applied live, no restart). This env var is the fallback default used until an
# admin sets it — leave it 'true' so the trail is on out of the box; the DB value
instructions: Run migrations to create the audit_logs table:  npm run migration:run -w <app>-api
Auth/admin actions (login, ban, role changes, session revocation, user CRUD) are recorded via a better-auth hook; your own mutating NestJS routes are recorded by the interceptor.
List recent entries (admin session required):  curl -b cookies.txt localhost:5002/audit-logs
